title: I'm Zeroing it
description: A diverse modpack featuring oldies like the Aether, Mekanism, Create as well as some more niche and obscure newcomers.
body:
# I'm Zeroing It
'I'm Zeroing It' is a modpack about friendship, magic, and exploiting the natural landscapes of all their resources. 
## Smell the Roses
Explore the lovely landscapes of a world not unlike our own with mods like Terralith, Geophilic, and Tectonic to change world gen into something beautiful. Gaze past the endless horizons with Distant Horizons while making sure you can be blinded by some good old light columns using Iris Shaders. Explore lands like the Aether, Bumblezone, and even the Afterdark - a dimension accessed by throwing wide the gates of an Ancient City's dormant portal. 

## Explore. Create. Exploit  
Use Mekanism or Create in order to better Explore, Expand, and Exploit the natural landscape and finally put down that supermarket you have always been looking to bulldoze that forest for. Finally solve your logistics issues using AE2 and XNet to ensure that your hair stays in your head just a little bit longer. 

Make sure to use that supermarket to sell all that food you're making with Farmer's Delight and Croptopia. 

## Draw out the Dark Arts
Convene with more occluded and obscure practices with mods like Occultism and Theurgy and find yourself abandoned past a line of no return. 


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

This modpack runs best with 5gb of Ram allocated.

</details>
